name: Nuvera Communications, Inc.
summary: Nuvera Communications, Inc. is a diversified communications company headquartered in New Ulm, Minnesota, with over 120 years of experience. Operating through seven communications subsidiaries, Nuvera provides fiber-to-the-premise broadband (100 Mbps to 1 Gbps), VoIP voice services, IPTV and cable television, long-distance, private line, and Ethernet services to residential and business customers across southern Minnesota and northern Iowa, serving 34,843 data connections and 9,889 access lines as of December 31, 2025.

products.name: Fiber Internet (FTTP)
products.description: Gigabit-speed fiber-to-the-premise broadband offering speeds from 100 Mbps to 1 Gbps, priced $50-$200/month.

products.name: VoIP Phone Service
products.description: Hosted VoIP using soft switching technology with calling features, IP phones, and unified messaging.

products.name: IPTV
products.description: Internet protocol television service offered across multiple Minnesota communities and Aurelia, Iowa.

products.name: Cable Television (CATV)
products.description: Cable TV systems operated in multiple Minnesota cities including New Ulm, Hutchinson, and Savage.

products.name: Private Line and Ethernet Services
products.description: Commercial data connectivity including private line and Ethernet for point-to-point and multi-site networks.

products.name: Long-Distance Service
products.description: Connection of customers to long-distance service providers via local network access.

products.name: Managed Services
products.description: Managed communications services offered to business customers over the fiber-optic network.

partnerships.description: 24.30% equity ownership; BBV provides video headend and Internet services.
14.29% equity ownership; IES provides E-911 services to Minnesota and Wisconsin.
7.63% equity ownership; FM operates a statewide Minnesota network for regional business connectivity.
